name: ophis
description: Onchain token swaps for AI agents via the hosted Ophis MCP server: MEV-protected, gasless, keyless, built on CoW Protocol.

interface.shortDescription: Onchain swaps via the hosted Ophis MCP server: MEV-protected, gasless, keyless.
interface.longDescription: Ophis gives a Codex agent onchain token swaps across 12 EVM chains through the hosted Ophis MCP server (12 tools) plus the ophis-swap workflow skill. Swaps are MEV-protected, gasless for the trader, keyless, and non-custodial: the server builds an unsigned order, the agent signs it, and the receiver is pinned to the signer. Built on CoW Protocol. This is Ophis the DEX (ophis.fi), not njayp/ophis, an unrelated Go MCP library.
